notableEvents.label: Connor Joe GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe grounds into a double play, shortstop Corey Seager to second baseman Josh Smith to first baseman Jake Burger. Mitch Garver out at 2nd. Connor Joe out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo reaches on a fielder's choice. Danny Jansen scores. Josh Smith scores. Ezequiel Duran to 3rd. Brandon Nimmo to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Connor Joe.
